description_long: This is a compact, cordless electric drill with a robust, ergonomic design, primarily colored in dark blue and black. The body features a textured grip handle for secure holding, a visible trigger button, and a detachable battery pack at the base labeled '16V LI-ION'. The drill's front end has a black, cylindrical chuck with no drill bit currently attached. Branding is visible on both sides of the main body, displaying the name 'NASALI'. The drill also has a few metallic accent screws and a small display or label area above the handle, with no visible power cord, indicating battery operation.
description: A dark blue and black cordless electric drill with a textured grip, visible trigger, and a labeled battery pack. Branding and details are clearly marked on the body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'NASALI' branding, trigger button, and full battery pack label.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the handle and battery pack, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with branding, trigger, and battery pack visible, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Front view showing the cylindrical chuck and the end of the battery pack, with no drill bit attached.
